title: How to Choose an eQMS
alt: Five-step process for selecting a compliant eQMS

items.label: Start with process
items.desc: Map and rationalise workflows before evaluating any features

items.label: Define requirements
items.desc: Separate mandatory from desirable; align to ICH Q10 records

items.label: Demand data integrity
items.desc: ALCOA+, audit trails, e-signatures and Annex 11 validation

items.label: Qualify the vendor
items.desc: Treat SaaS supplier as critical; pin down data ownership

items.label: Score, don't be sold
items.desc: Weighted scoring against total cost of ownership, not the demo

items.label: Plan migration & governance
items.desc: Verified data migration and ongoing validated-state control
